name: Bento Box Grid
description: A grid layout featuring one large spotlight panel alongside several smaller content panels. Uses panel-grid and stage-grid to create a visually balanced bento-style composition.

structure.html:
{{spotlight_label}}

{{spotlight_title}}

{{spotlight_body}}

{{panel_1_label}}

{{panel_1_title}}

{{panel_2_label}}

{{panel_2_title}}

{{panel_3_label}}

{{panel_3_title}}

spotlight_title.default: One panel carries the story. The rest support it.

spotlight_body.default: Use a single spotlight panel to anchor the grid and let smaller panels provide context and detail.

variants.name: horizontal-spotlight
variants.description: Spotlight panel spans the full width at the top
variants.html_diff: Move spotlight panel outside panel-grid into its own row, then panel-grid below

variants.name: six-panel
variants.description: Add two more content panels for a denser grid
variants.html_diff: Insert two additional content-panel articles into the panel-grid
